column4: Description

column74: Clarify the Research Objectives: Ensure that the aims and hypotheses are explicitly stated to provide clear direction for the study.Enhance Methodological Details: Include more information about the study design, sampling methods, and data collection procedures to improve reproducibility and transparency.Increase Sample Size: If feasible, consider enlarging the sample to improve the statistical power and generalizability of the findings.
